SQL_DATABASE.description: Core SQL querying, joins, window functions, aggregation, query performance, and database design.

BI_VISUALIZATION.description: Business intelligence concepts, dashboarding tools, visualization, Power BI, Tableau, DAX, and data modeling.

STATISTICS_EXPERIMENTATION.description: Statistics fundamentals, descriptive statistics, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, and A/B testing.

ANALYTICS_BUSINESS.description: Business analytics frameworks such as cohort analysis, funnel analysis, RFM analysis, and business/product metrics.

PYTHON_ANALYTICS.description: Python and Pandas for analytics, including preprocessing and basic data manipulation.

DATA_PIPELINE.description: ETL, ELT, CDC, orchestration, pipeline design, pipeline performance, and reliability.

DATA_ARCHITECTURE_MODELING.description: Data warehouse, data lake, star schema, slowly changing dimensions, and storage file formats.

BIG_DATA_CLOUD_TOOLS.description: Spark, Airflow, Kafka, cloud platforms, object storage, big data optimization, and Docker.

DATABASE_INTERNALS.description: Database indexing, performance tuning, scaling, sharding, and ACID concepts.

SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE.description: System design, streaming architecture, data architecture, and architecture-level thinking.

ALGORITHM_THEORY.description: Machine learning algorithm families, model selection, clustering, anomaly detection, recommender systems, and dimensionality reduction.

EVALUATION_METRICS.description: Classification and regression evaluation metrics, ROC-AUC, F1-score, cross-validation, and classification reports.

DATA_PREPROCESSING.description: Data cleaning, preprocessing, feature engineering, encoding techniques, and imbalanced data handling.

DEEP_LEARNING.description: Neural networks, deep learning training, optimization, CNNs, dropout, batch normalization, and gradient-related techniques.

NLP.description: NLP fundamentals, text preprocessing, and NLP evaluation.

MLOPS.description: Model explainability, MLOps, drift monitoring, production ML, and model monitoring.
